benefit_type: The higher of 101% Total Basic Premiums paid or Account Value
fund_name: Manulife Global Fund - Global Multi-Asset Diversified Income Fund AA (SGD Hedged) MDIST (G) (MGMD)
recommendation_text:
Client (ANB age 69) understands that CPF monies alone may be insufficient for retirement based on today's standard of living and inflation.

Client has indicated an expected retirement income need of $60,000 per year. This retirement income objective was considered when assessing the recommendation and affordability of the plan.

Client wishes to explore options to enhance retirement income and to build a retirement nest egg, after reviewing the desired retirement age and retirement plan.

Based on the consideration above, Manulife InvestReady (III) is recommended as an investment-linked plan to help the client participate in market opportunities while retaining insurance coverage. The selected fund allocation is Manulife Global Fund - Global Multi-Asset Diversified Income Fund AA (SGD Hedged) MDIST (G) (MGMD).

The proposed annual premium / budget is $50,000. Client has confirmed that the premium will be funded from existing savings and/or available financial resources.

CPF account information provided shows total CPF balances of approximately $762,085. The CPF information was considered together with other disclosed assets when assessing affordability and concentration risk.

The client has been informed that returns, dividends and surrender values are not guaranteed. Fund prices may go up or down and past performance is not indicative of future performance.

For Manulife InvestReady (III) 10 Years Flexi 3, client has the flexibility to pay premiums for the first 3 policy years or continue to contribute thereafter. Client has also been informed that withdrawals or surrender within the first 10 policy years may incur applicable surrender / withdrawal charges.

The investment exposure remains within the client's disclosed financial position and the client has indicated sufficient liquidity to continue with the proposed arrangement.

Client acknowledges the explanation provided and has decided to proceed with the application.
